user_no_password: This account has no password. Please set a password first.
otp_validated: OTP successfully validated. You can now continue.
welcome_sms: Welcome {{full_name}}! Account: {{account_number}}, Phone: {{phone}}. Password: {{password}}. Log in now.
password_too_short: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
no_email: This user has no email registered
no_phone: This user has no phone number registered
no_password_set: This account has no password set
email_otp_message: We detected a login attempt to your ACCESPAY account. To complete access, please use the unique code below:
email_otp_ignore: If you did not initiate this request, simply ignore this message. Never share this code.
email_welcome_message: Congratulations! Your ACCESPAY account is now active. You can now enjoy a modern, fast and secure banking experience.
email_welcome_recommend: We recommend changing your password on your first login to ensure the security of your transactions.
email_welcome_support: The ACCESPAY team is at your disposal for any questions. Thank you for your trust.
reset_email_message: We received a request to reset your ACCESPAY account password. To secure your account, please use the unique code below:
reset_email_ignore: If you did not request this, please ignore this email. Never share this code.
reset_email_thanks: For any questions, please contact our support.
account_suspended: Your account is suspended. Please contact the administrator.
account_inactive: Your account is inactive. Please contact the administrator.
account_blocked: Your account is blocked. Please contact the administrator.
account_not_active: Your account is not active. Please contact the administrator.
cannot_change_own_status: You cannot change your own status
account_locked: Account locked for {minutes} minute(s). Please try again later.
login_in_progress: A login is already in progress for this user. Please wait.
